characters.name: Akane Awakusu
characters.description: Akane AwakusuSeason 2Re; DollarsNovelGeneral InformationAge10 (at introduction)12 (SH)BirthdayAugust 24Height117cm (3'10")Blood typeANationalityJapaneseOccupationStudent (Current)AffiliationAwakusu-kaiFamilyMikiya Awakusu(father)Dougen Awakusu(grandfather)Voiced byMisaki Kuno(Japanese)Brianna Knickerbocker(English)AppearanceAnime debutShou Episode 5Novel debutVolume 5,Chapter 1Akane Awakusu(粟楠 茜,Awakusu Akane) is the daughter ofMikiya Awakusuand the granddaughter ofDougen Awakusu. Until recently, she had no idea that her family was involved in illegal activities, much less that they run a well-known crime syndicate. After discovering the true nature of her family's business, she runs away from home and intoIzaya's clutches.  Akane has bobbed dark-black hair with long bangs that always seem to be covering one of her eyes.

characters.name: Aoba Kuronuma
characters.description: Aoba KuronumaSeason 2Re; DollarsNovelGeneral InformationOnline nameDollars: Wakaba Mark (若葉マーク)Chat Room: Pure Water 100%Age15 (at introduction)17 (SH)BirthdayAugust 14thHeight160 cm (5'3")Blood typeABNationalityJapaneseOccupationStudentAffiliationBlue SquaresDollarsFamilyRan Izumii(older brother)Voiced byHiro Shimono(Japanese)Kyle McCarley(English)AppearanceAnime debutShou episode 1Novel debutVolume 4,Chapter 2Aoba Kuronuma(黒沼 青葉,Kuronuma Aoba) is a first-year student atRaira AcademyandMikado's junior. He is the original founder of theBlue Squares. Aoba has a bright personality and is always seen smiling, but he has a darker side that is highly manipulative and cunning. He is described as being akin to "a younger version ofIzaya Orihara." Aoba appears in the second season of the anime and is involved in the events ofDurarara!! SH. Before Aoba's parents divorced and when he started living with his mother, it is revealed that he used to be calledAoba Izumii(泉井 青葉 Izumii Aoba) before using his mother's surname as his current last name. Physically speaking, Aoba is an average-looking teenager with dark blue hair and brown eyes. In the light novel, his features are usually described as girlish and child-like, and he is short enough to be mistaken for an elementary or middle school student. He wears the standard Raira uniform at school and usually wears a light blue hoodie and a t-shirt as casual clothes. He has an average physical frame but is surprisingly decent in a fight. His true strength lies in his mental capabilities as he is a thorough planner and an effective manipulator.

characters.name: Asanuma
characters.description: AsanumaGeneral InformationNationalityJapaneseOccupationHuman TraffickerAffiliationYagiri PharmaceuticalsDollarsVoiced byKentarō Itō(Japanese)Michael Sorich(English)AppearanceAnime debutEpisode 1Novel debutVolume 1,Chapter 1Asanuma(浅沼) is the driver of the human trafficking trio that delivers people toYagiri Pharmaceuticalsfor their human experiments. His partners areMoritaandKanazawa. All three are members of theDollars. Michael Sorich(English) Asanuma is an overweight man of average height. He has short spiky scruffy black hair and has pronounced lips. He has stubble on his chin and has small black eyes, typically he is seen wearing a navy blue shirt under a blue track jacket with a white stripe going down the sleeves. He also wears long beige shorts.

characters.name: Aya Tatsugami
characters.description: Aya TatsugamiGeneral InformationNameAya TatsugamiNationalityJapaneseOccupationReporterFamilyHimeka Tatsugami(younger sister)Ai Tatsugami (younger sister)Aya Tatsugami(辰神 彩,Tatsugami Aya) is a character inDurarara!! SH. She is the older sister ofHimeka TatsugamiandAi Tatsugamiwho mysteriously disappears after investigating theHeadless Rider. Aya has strong beliefs in doing what is right, even turning her father in for his crimes in loaning money illicitly. However, her involvement in her father's arrest lead to her being reprimanded by her mother. Years later, she's even stabbed by a client of her father's. This causes her to not only question her place in the world, but to develop a deep hatred for the world's seeming unfairness. After seeing the Headless Rider on television, Aya begins to form an obsession over it, convinced that it is the savior that could save them from the cruel world. However, Aya's sister consistently points out that this absurd belief is just Aya's way of running from her problems. characters.name: Ayumi Usubara
characters.description: Ayumi UsubaraGeneral InformationNameAyumi UsubaraAge28Height6'6"NationalityJapaneseOccupationHit-man (former)AffiliationFutsuku Group(former)FamilyYuuki Usubara (step-mother)Miharu Otonobe (step-aunt)Rui Otonobe (step-cousin)AppearanceNovel debutA Sunset with Izaya OriharaChapter 3 Side BAyumi Usubara(臼原 歩美,Usubara Ayumi) is a former hit-man of theFutsuku Group, where he worked underAdamura. The Futsuku Group was disbanded after Izaya caused the end ofBunokura. Since the disbandment, Ayumi and his step-mother, Yuuki, have been hunting down bothIzaya OriharaandDensuke Sozorofor revenge. Miharu Otonobe (step-aunt)Rui Otonobe (step-cousin) Nicknamed "The Feudal Lord's Pet Whale" and "The Blue Whale Baseball Stadium Destroyer," Ayumi is described as having many scars on his face which is mostly covered by black bandages, dyed blue hair, and is frequently seen wearing a business suit. Ayumi is also known to be 'not the brightest' and a man of few words. He is someone who knows only violence. Nicknamed "The Feudal Lord's Pet Whale" and "The Blue Whale Baseball Stadium Destroyer," Ayumi is described as having many scars on his face which is mostly covered by black bandages, dyed blue hair, and is frequently seen wearing a business suit. Ayumi is also known to be 'not the brightest' and a man of few words. He is someone who knows only violence. According to rumors, Ayumi is said to have taken down a boar by lifting a vending machine and dropping it on the boar. He is known for his ability to lift vending machines, although he cannot throw them. He is also noted to go into blind rages, and at least once in the novels he injures a woman, though he does not remember doing so afterwards and feels bad about it.

characters.name: Byakuyamaru Natsugawara
characters.description: Byakuyamaru NatsugawaraGeneral InformationNameByakuyamaru NatsugawaraAgeMiddle-agedNationalityJapaneseOccupationBusiness ownerFamilyYukihiko​ ​Natsugawara(eldest son)Jami​ ​Natsugawara (adopted son)Awayuki​ ​Natsugawara (daughter)AppearanceNovel debutDurarara!! SHx4Byakuyamaru Natsugawara(夏瓦 白夜丸,NatsugawaraByakuyamaru) is a childhood friend ofShingen Kishitaniand the current owner of the Natsugawara Group, a toy company, as well as the Natsugawara Summer Tile Baseball Stadium. Generally outspoken and good-natured, his sense of ethics is one of the few questionable things about him. Byakuyamaru is described as being young in appearance but dressed in the stereotypical manner of a wealthy person.

characters.name: Celty Sturluson
characters.description: Celty SturlusonSeason 1MangaStageGeneral InformationNameCelty SturlusonAliasBlack RiderHeadless RiderHalloween Knight (byVorona)Online nameDollars: ShooterChat Room: Setton (セットン)Height174 cm (5'8.5") (with helmet)NationalityIrishOccupationTransporterAffiliationDollarsSnake HandsFamilyShinra Kishitani(fiance)Emilia Kishitani(mother-in-law)Shingen Kishitani(father-in-law)Voiced byMiyuki Sawashiro(Japanese)Kari Wahlgren(English)Franca Orlia(German)AppearanceAnime debutEpisode 1Manga debutVolume 1,Chapter 1Novel debutVolume 1,Chapter 1Celty Sturluson(セルティ ストゥルルソン,Celty Sturluson), also known asThe Black RiderorThe Headless Rider, is an Irish fairy called aDullahanwho came to Japan looking for her stolen head. She lives withShinra Kishitaniand works as an underground transporter, wearing a helmet when she goes out to hide her lack of a head and communicating viaPDA. Her motorcycle is a familiar called a Cóiste Bodhar in disguise, which she has namedShooterand whose favored alternate guise is a headless horse. She enjoys chatting online and is a member of theDollarsand, later,Snake Hands. Snake Hands Celty is a slim, tall woman who can be easily mistaken for a man. She has pale white skin, and her head is shown to have brown hair and blue eyes. In her early years, it is shown that Celty wore knight's armor as she traveled the country side with her head resting on her lap. When she immigrated to Japan, she updates her attire to match the times. For most of the series, Celty is shown to wear an all black biker jumpsuit with black gloves and shoes. With the exception of pajamas and slippers shown in the anime, all of her clothing is made from a shadow-like substance that materializes around her at her will. She also wears a yellow and blue helmet that vaguely resembles the shape of a cat's head.

characters.name: Chako
characters.description: ChakoGeneral InformationNameChakoOccupationOffice workerAffiliationDollars(formerly)AppearanceNovel debutDurarara!!x10,InterludeChakois an office worker in Hokkaido and one of the founding members of theDollars. Chako is a salarywoman who seems to use the internet to live a fantasy and search for excitement, enough to don a false identity as a middle school girl online. When she begins suspecting that one of her seemingly ordinary acquaintances is actually quite unhinged, however, she is intimidated enough to leave her social circle. Chako recounts to an office coworker an online experience she had several years prior, when she joined an obscure internet chat room by pretending to be a middle schooler. When one of her online acquaintances suggested starting their own gang, they began posting the Dollars name on internet message boards as an inside joke, but eventually stories about the Dollars began appearing online independent of the original group. The other founding members left as the rumor that they had created started to turn into something real. Chako intended to stick around longer to enjoy the rise of the Dollars inIkebukurofrom the safe distance of Hokkaido, until one of the other founders, someone who had seemed innocent and normal in the beginning, began showing a devotion to the gang that frightened Chako. With the realization thatTarouTanakamight be crazy, she left the Dollars behind. Chako implies that she is still active online and loosely follows the goings-on of the Dollars without taking part herself or interacting with TarouTanaka.

characters.name: Chiaki Igarashi
characters.description: Chiaki IgarashiGeneral InformationNameChiaki Igarashi五十嵐 千晶,Igarashi ChiakiAge15NationalityJapaneseOccupationStudentAffiliationDollarsVoiced byKanae ItoAppearanceGame debutDurarara!! 3way standoffManga debutDurarara!! 3way standoff -alley-Chiaki Igarashi(五十嵐 千晶,Igarashi Chiaki) is a character who debuted inDurarara!! 3way standoff. She is a first year student atElizabeth Girls' College, a prestigious private high school for girls located in the center ofIkebukuro. Chiaki has dark brown hair and brown eyes. She is normally seen wearing her high school uniform, which consists of a white collared shirt and a light grey sweater with a yellow bow tie, a brown jacket, a tan skirt and black boots.

characters.name: Chikage Rokujou
characters.description: Chikage RokujouSeason 2NovelGeneral InformationNameChikage RokujouAge20'sBirthdayFebruary 3Height179 cm (5'10")Blood typeABNationalityJapaneseOccupationBosozokuAffiliationToramaruVoiced byYuuki Ono(Japanese)Grant George(English)AppearanceAnime debutShou Episode 5Manga debutRe;Dollars Arc Volume 1, Chapter 1Novel debutVolume 5,Chapter 1Chikage Rokujou(六条 千景Rokujō Chikage), also known asRocchi, is the leader of a large biker gang calledToramaruthat is primarily based in the Saitama region. He is a self-styled ladies' man as he usually has an entourage of about 10 or so girls following him around. Chikage's character sheets

characters.name: Denis
characters.description: DenisGeneral InformationAliasThe Chef(Durarara!!x3)The Manager(Durarara!!x4)NationalityRussianOccupationSushi ChefAffiliationRussia SushiVoiced byShinya Takahashi(Japanese)Christopher Corey Smith(English)AppearanceAnime debutEpisode 5Novel debutVolume 2,Chapter 3Denis(デニス,Denis, Russian:Денис) is an old friend ofSimon Brezhnevand the owner ofRussia Sushi. He works inside Russia Sushi as the chef while Simon usually waits on customers. Denis is a large white middle-aged Russian man with pale-gray eyes and short, slicked-back gray hair, usually seen working behind the counter as a chef inRussia Sushi. As such, he is always seen wearing the Russia Sushi uniform. He doesn't wear the same hat as Simon, instead he wears a twisted rope around his head which is typical of the head chef at sushi restaurants. As a result of his past in the Soviet Union, Denis, like Simon, is a pacifist and tries to stop conflicts before they start. He appears wise and well-connected, as he is able to offer sound advice and has the contact information ofIzayaandHaruya Shiki. Unlike Simon, Denis speaks fluent Japanese, but he speaks up less than his partner.

Unlike Simon, Denis speaks fluent Japanese, but he speaks up less than his partner.

characters.name: Densuke Sozoro
characters.description: Densuke SozoroGeneral InformationNameDensuke SozoroAge70NationalityJapaneseOccupationBodyguardAffiliationIzaya OriharaAppearanceNovel debutA Sunset with Izaya OriharaDensuke Sozoro(坐傳助,Sozoro Densuke) is a character from theWith Izaya Oriharaseries. He is a bodyguard whichIzayacontracted. He was once the strongest martial artist in the Kanto region and taught his craft toTraugott Geissendörfer, a famed martial artist who founded the franchise of gyms to which Rakuei Gym belongs. Sozoro wears a white and black suit and circular glasses. He is is said to have proper posture and an 'accurate glint' to his eyes, giving him the appearance of a butler or a bodyguard.

characters.name: Dougen Awakusu
characters.description: Dougen AwakusuGeneral InformationNationalityJapaneseAffiliationAwakusu-KaiFamilyMikiya Awakusu(son)Akane Awakusu(granddaughter)Voiced byShouzou Iizuka(Japanese)Beau Billingslea(English)AppearanceAnime debutShou Episode 10Novel debutDurarara!!x6Dougen Awakusu(粟楠 道元,Awakusu Dōgen) is the current head of theAwakusu-kaiwho is respected as a great leader, the father ofMikiya Awakusuand the grandfather ofAkane Awakusu. He gives off an almost 'Santa Claus' like vibe to those who know him, especially his family. He has bits of metal embedded into his body which were earned over his long service to the Awakusu. He has also earned the loyalty of almost everyone under him and never betrays his subordinates (although he may refuse to save them from a life threatening situation if he sees fit). His decision to transfer leadership over to his second son,Mikiya, has been opposed by many members of the Awakusu, but none of them are willing say such while in his presence. He is also a known fan ofRuri Hijiribe. He gives off an almost 'Santa Claus' like vibe to those who know him, especially his family. He has bits of metal embedded into his body which were earned over his long service to the Awakusu. He has also earned the loyalty of almost everyone under him and never betrays his subordinates (although he may refuse to save them from a life threatening situation if he sees fit). His decision to transfer leadership over to his second son,Mikiya, has been opposed by many members of the Awakusu, but none of them are willing say such while in his presence. He is also a known fan ofRuri Hijiribe.

characters.name: Douma Kiyojima
characters.description: Douma KiyojimaGeneral InformationNameDouma KiyojimaAge28OccupationGarbage collectorAffiliationOukarengo (former)FamilyMunenori Kiyojima (father)Nana Kiyojima(sister)AppearanceNovel debutA Sunset with Izaya OriharaDouma Kiyojima(喜代島 堂馬,Kiyojima Dōma) is the eldest son of congressman Munenori Kiyojima. Presently, he works as a garbage collector at a cleaning company his father owns. Douma is described as wearing a gaudy jacket but having honest features. However, despite his honest features, it is also said that he emits an air different from most respectable people. Short-tempered, entitled, and with a callous and disrespectful way of speaking, Douma disrespects even Izaya during their first conversation. Referring to him as a 'hick' and even passively threatening to strangle him as he did to all the former informants he has met, Douma's personality is described by Izaya as more brawn than brain.

characters.name: Drakon
characters.description: DrakonGeneral InformationNameunknownAliasDrakonNationalityRussianOccupationArms dealerFamilyVorona (wife)Vorona(daughter)Voiced byKazuhiro Yamaji(Japanese)Kirk Thornton(English)AppearanceAnime debutShou Episode 7Novel debutVolume 5Drakon(Russian:Дракон) is a Russian arms dealer andVorona's father. He and his comradeLingerin Douglanikovare joint leaders of a Russian organization dealing in weapons. Drakon started off his career working as a hitman for a mercenary band under the code name 'Yashcheritsa.' The leader of the group at the time ordered Drakon to act as his body guard, fearing the infamous assassin 'Vorona' was after them. Whilst Drakon conversed with his then-employer, they were attacked by the very assassin, using Drakon's retaliation to her advantage to shoot down his employer and comrades. After the assassin took out his comrades, Drakon saw no reason he should continue fighting - his mission already a failure - and let the assassin 'Vorona' go. Before 'Vorona' vanished into the night, he asked her: "How could I see you again?" To which the young woman advised him to break away from his confinements and achieve greater heights. At some unidentified point, Drakon does accomplish this task, as the pair eventually become married and have a daughter together, who would later uptake the same code name as her mother. According to Drakon, his wife has long since passed, though the circumstances of her death remain unknown.

characters.name: Earthworm
characters.description: EarthwormSeason 2NovelGeneral InformationAge25BirthdayAugust[1]NationalityJapaneseAffiliationAmphisbaenaHaruna'sSaika ArmyVoiced byKikuko Inoue(Japanese)Carrie Keranen(English)AppearanceAnime debutTen Episode 8Novel debutVolume 9, PrologueEarthworm(ミミズ,Mimizu) is the former leader ofAmphisbaenawho had been running an illegal gambling parlor. She is one of two major antagonists featured involume 9and in the sequelDurarara!! SH. A well-endowed woman in her twenties, Earthworm has short, shaggy blonde hair and a slender build. She has an Amphisbaena tattoo on her left shoulder and is seen wearing black opera gloves and a purple evening gown with a halter neck that emphasizes her breasts. Although she tries to keep a calm and collected demeanor, when the right buttons are pushed, Earthworm reveals a much more manic mentality due to her obsession over a former classmate of hers. When backed into a corner, she panics easily and constantly pleads with a non-existent "owner" to help her. She is shown to be somewhat capable in a fight.

characters.name: Egor
characters.description: EgorGeneral InformationNameEgorAliasMurder-Machine Philosopher (Philosophical Killing Machine in the anime)NationalityRussianOccupationAssassinAffiliationNebulaSaika ArmyVoiced byToshiyuki Morikawa(Japanese)Lex Lang(English)AppearanceAnime debutShou episode 2Novel debutVolume 4,PrologueEgor(エゴール,Egоr, Russian:Егoр) is a Russian assassin working forNebula. He is regarded as the seventh deadliest assassin in Russia and is known for being able to use almost anything as a weapon. As such, Egor never brings his own weapons into battle. Egor is an old comrade ofSimonandDenis. Aside fromShingen, who relays information to him from Nebula, no one is able to establish regular contact with him. Egor is extremely tall and has grey-ish blue eyes and dirty blond hair. He always appears to be wearing a navy blue pullover, black dress pants, and a black blazer or trench coat; he is also occasionally wearing a white lab coat and gas mask. After his face is ran through the side of a building by Shizuo, it is wrapped in bandages, and after he undergoes plastic surgery appears different. And when he is under the control ofSaika, His eyes appear to be glowing red.

characters.name: Eiichirou Sharaku
characters.description: Eiichirou SharakuGeneral InformationNameEiichirou SharakuNationalityJapaneseOccupationMartial arts instructorAffiliationRakuei GymFamilyEijirou Sharaku(younger brother)Mikage Sharaku(younger sister)Eiji Sharaku (father)AppearanceNovel debutVolume 9, Chapter 5Eiichirou Sharakuis the older brother ofEijirouandMikage Sharaku. Like his father and younger siblings, he is a martial artist and trainer and helps run Rakuei Gym. Eiichirou is described as a squat man, but only so because his bulging muscles are disproportionate to his taller-than-average height. Eiichirou asks an assistant about the whereabouts of his younger brother, hoping that his slacker sibling is not picking fights in the street as he often does. Unbeknownst to Eiichirou, Eijirou is in fact getting into a fight outside, but only to protectMairu Oriharafrom theAmphisbaenathugs trying to abduct her.

characters.name: Eijirou Sharaku
characters.description: Eijirou SharakuSeason 2Re;DollarsGeneral InformationOnline nameSharo (しゃろ) (Chat Room)Agelate 20sNationalityJapaneseOccupationMartial arts instructorFamilyMikage Sharaku(younger sister)Eiichirou Sharaku(older brother)Eiji Sharaku (father)Voiced byKENN(Japanese)Kaiji Tang(English)AppearanceAnime debutTen Episode 5Novel debutVolume 8,PrologueEijirou Sharaku(写楽 影次郎,Sharaku Eijirō) is a martial arts teacher at his family's dojo, Rakuei Gym, alongside his father, older brotherEiichirou, and younger sisterMikage. He teaches self-defense toMairu OriharaandAkane Awakusu. Eijirou is shown most often as having short brown hair, a short beard, and wearing a grey tank top and shorts. He is not described in detail in the novels and was first seen when character sheets were released for the second season of the anime. While training Mairu, Eijirou warns her to stay away fromKisuke Adabashi, a man who has been coming to the dojo lately and whom Eijirou feels is dangerous. At Mairu's invitation, he soon after joins thechat room.

characters.name: Emilia Kishitani
characters.description: Emilia KishitaniSeason 2Re;DollarsGeneral InformationAgeEarly 20'sNationalityAmericanOccupationResearcherAffiliationNebulaFamilyShingen Kishitani(husband)Shinra Kishitani(step-son)Celty Sturluson(daughter-in-law)Voiced byAtsumi Tanezaki(Japanese)Karen Strassman(English)AppearanceAnime debutShou episode 1Novel debutVolume 3Emilia Kishitani(エミリア岸谷,Emilia Kishitani) isShingen Kishitani's new wife andShinra Kishitani’s step-mother. She and Shingen apparently met while researching atNebula. She appears to share Shinra and Shingen's obsession with the supernatural and even paysCelty Sturlusonfor the privilege of performing an autopsy on her. Emilia is beautiful young woman of European descent with short blonde hair, and lime green eyes. And she is rather well-endowed, as she is described as having large breasts. Her usual wardrobe consists of a white lab coat and a green undershirt. She also wears a gas mask likeShingen Kishitani, but she does not use it nearly as often as her husband and treats it more as a gimmick than a necessity.

characters.name: Erika Karisawa
characters.description: Erika KarisawaSeason 1StageGeneral InformationNameErika KarisawaAliasEternal de Charmante (cosplay name)Online nameKahlua Milk (カルアミルク)BirthdayNovember 3Height160 cm (5'3")WeightEqual to 19 super deluxe illustration books (limited edition!)Blood typeBNationalityJapaneseOccupationJewelry makingAffiliationVan GangDollarsVoiced byAyahi Takagaki(Japanese)Mela Lee(English)Josephine Schmidt(German)AppearanceAnime debutEpisode 1Novel debutVolume 1,Chapter 4Erika Karisawa(狩沢 絵理華,Karisawa Erika) is a member of theDollarsand can usually be seen driving around the city with her friendsWalker Yumasaki,Saburo Togusa, andKyouhei Kadota. She and Walker are incredibly close due to their both beingotaku, people obsessed with anime and manga. Erika is also a cosplayer and afujoshi, a fan of romantic male relationships in manga and novels. Mela Lee(English)Josephine Schmidt(German) Erika has brown eyes and brown hair. Her hair is typically worn in a braid along the back of her head, with two pieces of her hair hanging freely in front of her ears. She wears a black newsboy cap and a long-sleeved, black Chinese cheongsam with black ankle boots. She also carries a small, silver slash bag.

characters.name: Ganguro Girls
characters.description: Ganguro GirlsGeneral InformationNameHaruko (晴子) (blonde hair)Youko (陽子) (brown hair)Akie (秋絵) (pink hair)NationalityJapaneseOccupationStudentsAffiliationRaira AcademyDollarsSaika ArmyVoiced byHaruko: Nozomi Sasaki (JP), Megan Hollingshead (EN)Youko: Eri Miyajima (JP), Melissa Fahn (EN)Akie: Kanako Sakai (JP), Laura Bailey (EN)AppearanceAnime debutSeason 1, Episode 3Novel debutVolume 1,Chapter 8TheGanguro Girlsare a trio of girls who bullyAnri Sonohara. They are students atRaira Academyand members of theDollars, and after becoming victims of theslasher, they are also members of theSaika Army. Like other young women who dress in the ganguro fashion, the girls have tanned skin with contrasting light makeup and dyed hair. They sport a number of accessories and are usually seen in pastels, and they wear angel wings on their school uniforms. The trio bulliesAnri Sonoharaon several occasions. They are hostile and dismissive toward people who appear passive, such as Anri andMikado Ryuugamine, but when faced with someone stronger, such asMika Harima,Izaya OriharaorCelty Sturluson, they show cowardice and often run away. When possessed bySaika, however, they display incredible strength, speed, and dexterity.

characters.name: Ginichirou Kuzuhara
characters.description: Ginichirou KuzuharaGeneral InformationNationalityJapaneseOccupationPolice officerFamilyKinnosuke Kuzuhara(younger brother)Maju Kuzuhara(niece)Souta Kuzuhara (son)Souji Kuzuhara (son)Voiced byKeiji Fujiwara(Japanese)AppearanceAnime debutEpisode 15Novel debutVolume 2,Chapter 5Ginichirou Kuzuhara(葛原 実一郎,Kuzuhara Ginichirō) is a police officer inIkebukuroand a member of the Kuzuhara family, a large family with most of its members in the police force. Ginichirou's character sheet Ginichirou is a middle-aged man with a stern face and brown hair that flips out below his cap. He wears rectangular glasses and a police uniform with a radio on his left shoulder.

characters.name: Ginichirou Kuzuhara
characters.description: Ginichirou KuzuharaGeneral InformationNationalityJapaneseOccupationPolice officerFamilyKinnosuke Kuzuhara(younger brother)Maju Kuzuhara(niece)Souta Kuzuhara (son)Souji Kuzuhara (son)Voiced byKeiji Fujiwara(Japanese)AppearanceAnime debutEpisode 15Novel debutVolume 2,Chapter 5Ginichirou Kuzuhara(葛原 実一郎,Kuzuhara Ginichirō) is a police officer inIkebukuroand a member of the Kuzuhara family, a large family with most of its members in the police force. He wears rectangular glasses and a police uniform with a radio on his left shoulder.

characters.name: Hajime Shishizaki
characters.description: Hajime ShishizakiGeneral InformationNameHajime ShishizakiAgeMid-20sNationalityJapaneseOccupationShop employee (former)StudentAffiliationRussia Sushi(formerly)AppearanceNovel debutDurarara!!x9, Chapter 3 (mention only)Hajime Shishizakiis a character mentioned inDurarara!!x9who has, so far, never made a physical appearance in the series. Almost nothing is known about Shishizaki in terms of his personality or his overall appearance. In terms of physical abilities, Shishizaki is said to rival bothIzaya OriharaandShizuo Heiwajimain agility and strength, respectively. He is also apparently well-trained, as there are rumors saying that a US soldier who was vacationing in Japan was beaten by Shishizaki in a fist-fight. What little is known about his history before the series is that he is the son of a rich family and that he attendedRaijin Academywith Shizuo, Izaya,Shinra Kishitani, andKyouhei Kadota. He was popular at school and was a relatively good student. It is said that he would frequently get caught in the battles between Shizuo and Izaya, although it is unclear if his involvement was intentional or accidental. He is said to have been fast enough to catch Izaya in parkour (which Shizuo was unable to do in their teenage years) and strong enough to stop Shizuo during his rampages. Once, Celty saw people being punched into the sky from a distance and thought she was seeing Shizuo, but when she walked closer, she realized it was not Shizuo but someone else (Shishizaki). Almost nothing is known about Shishizaki in terms of his personality or his overall appearance. In terms of physical abilities, Shishizaki is said to rival bothIzaya OriharaandShizuo Heiwajimain agility and strength, respectively. He is also apparently well-trained, as there are rumors saying that a US soldier who was vacationing in Japan was beaten by Shishizaki in a fist-fight.

characters.name: Haruna Niekawa
characters.description: Haruna NiekawaSeason 2MangaNovelMiniDuraGeneral InformationAge16 (at start)17 (Dragon Zombie Arc)Height165 cm (5' 4")NationalityJapaneseOccupationStudentAffiliationSaika ArmyDollarsFamilyShuuji Niekawa(father)Voiced byMai Nakahara(Japanese)Sandy Fox(English)AppearanceAnime debutEpisode 5Manga debutSaika Arc Volume 2,Chapter 10Novel debutVolume 2,Chapter 5Haruna Niekawa(贄川 春奈,Niekawa Haruna) is a formerRaira Academystudent who transferred to another high school because of a rumor that she andTakashi Nasujima, a teacher, were dating. Involume 10, she is said to be a member of theDollars. When Haruna is first introduced, she is shown to have long, slightly unkempt black hair that extends down to her waist. She also has a blank yet manic smile on her face, likely caused bySaikadriving her insane. In her first appearance, she wore her school uniform, which was similar in design toRaira's save for the much longer skirt and yellow tie. When she returns involume 8, Haruna's appearance has changed significantly. Instead of her school uniform, she wears a long pink dress and a pink headband. She carries several small knives hidden under her skirt and uses a large red scythe instead of her old kitchen knife. Haruna also has several bandages wrapped around the spot on her neck whereAnricut her the first time they fought.

characters.name: Haruto
characters.description: HarutoGeneral InformationNameHarutoAgeElementary School AgeNationalityJapaneseAppearanceNovel debutA Sunset with Izaya OriharaHaruto(遥人) is a young orphaned boy who first appears inA Sunset with Izaya Oriharaafter losing both of his parents.  Haruto is portrayed as cheerful and innocent. He does not know Izaya's hand in his father’s death and admires him a lot for "helping" them and for his power, where Haruto is powerless. He wants to become like Izaya even if he has to sacrifice his own humanity (which Izaya obviously would not prefer). It is stated that Haruto is clinging to Izaya to keep himself together.

characters.name: Haruya Shiki
characters.description: Haruya ShikiSeason 1Re;DollarsNovelGeneral InformationAgeAbout 30NationalityJapaneseOccupationYakuza executiveAffiliationAwakusu-KaiVoiced byHōchū Ōtsuka(Japanese)Dan Woren(English)Robert Levin(German)AppearanceAnime debutEpisode 7Novel debutVolume 2,Chapter 2Haruya Shiki(四木 春也,Shiki Haruya) is a prominent member of underground organizationAwakusu-kai. He frequently asksCeltyandShinrato do jobs as a favor to him, so much so that he is the only person outside of Shinra's immediate family who has a spare key to their apartment. Robert Levin(German) Although it does not initially seem like it, Shiki adheres to a strict code of honor, especially when dealing with clients. He addresses guests with the utmost respect no matter who they are or what their background is. However, he keeps an intimidating aura around him at all times as to not appear weak. He is also very perceptive, as shown when he is able to read Celty's mood through her body language, as well as being one of the first people to seriously considerShizuo Heiwajimanot being responsible for the murders that took place in volumes 5 and 6, even without Shinra's help.
